meta.title: Hatchet Cleaning Co. — Vancouver
meta.description: House cleaning, deep cleans, and move-out service across Greater Vancouver. Fixed-quote, no surprises.

business.name: Hatchet Cleaning Co.
business.tagline: House cleaning that doesn't waste your time.

data.headline: House cleaning that doesn't waste your time.
data.subhead: Fixed-quote pricing. Same crew every visit. Bring your own products if you want — or use ours.

items.title: Regular Clean
items.description: Bi-weekly or monthly. Bathrooms, kitchens, floors, and dusting. About 2.5 hours for a 2BR.

items.title: Deep Clean
items.description: Inside the oven, behind the appliances, baseboards, blinds. Annual or move-in.

items.title: Move-Out Clean
items.description: Damage-deposit-grade. We've never had a tenant lose their deposit because of us.

items.author: Mark D.
items.text: Booked the deep clean. Showed up on time, brought their own gear, finished in 4 hours. Will book again.

items.author: Priya S.
items.text: Bi-weekly for 18 months. Same crew every time, same standard. Worth every dollar.

items.author: Chen W.
items.text: Move-out clean for my landlord. Got the full deposit back. They charge fair, work fast, no nonsense.

data.headline: Get a quote in under 2 minutes.
data.subhead: Tell us your square footage and bedroom count. We'll text back within the hour.

data.headline: We answer between 8 and 6, six days a week.
